title: Converted: Aether Template Playground
description: Structured conversion of legacy contentData[210]. The original legacy slides remain available for comparison.

slides.title: Welcome to the Sanctuary Orbit
slides.subtitle: Settle into a slow arc around Jaranius and let each vista become an invitation to listen.

slides.title: The Breath Beneath the Stars
slides.body: Pause by the ridge. Feel the first light fold into the sky, echoing the stillness within.

slides.title: Falling in Love with the Breath
slides.body: A compact practice slide for breath attention.
bullets: Settle attention on the cool breath at the nostrils.
Notice subtle shifts: stillness, vibration, soft expansion.
When the mind wanders, bow, begin again, and savour the return.

slides.title: Seven Steps to a Soft Landing
steps: Begin in orbit and sense the planet-wide context.
Choose one luminous node that stirs genuine interest.
Glide closer and pause within two breaths of distance.
Allow attention to settle in the body.
Invite the node's story to surface.
Note one phrase, image, or feeling, then expand back to orbit with one resonance.

slides.title: The Guest House of Breath

body.text: Each inhale is a doorway, each exhale a tide leaving gifts on the shore.

body: The planet waits in luminous patience as you remember how to be welcomed by your own belonging.

slides.title: Vulnerable Strength
slides.body: Invite participants into an external practice while keeping the launch slide visually consistent.

slides.title: Orbit-to-Surface Transition
slides.body: Test embedded media playback and iframe scaling with a structured media slide.

slides.title: Type 9 - The Peacemaker
bullets: Healthy: receptive, embodied, and naturally calming.
Watch: sliding into numb merging or inertia.
Practice: daily check-ins with desire, voice, and boundaries.

timeline.title: Dawn - Orienting
timeline.body: Orbit overview, intention setting, and sensory calibration.

timeline.title: Midday - Deep Dive
timeline.body: Guided descent into selected mindmap clusters with reflective journalling.

timeline.title: Evening - Integration
timeline.body: Shared storytelling, developer HUD toggles, and closing breath ritual.

items.title: Intro Audio
items.text: Confirm the selected intro track and ensure subtitles are synced.

items.title: Developer HUD
items.text: Toggle metrics on, clear previous selections, and reset flight speed modifiers.

items.title: Mindmap Freshness
items.text: Regenerate nuggets and ensure all appear animations reset.

slides.title: Join the Orbiting Council
slides.body: A small circle for co-designers who want to steward the Planet's next evolution.
slides.note: Bring curiosity, craft, and a willingness to listen deeply.

slides.title: Triad Crosswalk
rows: Story circles, gratitude orbit, shared breath
Flight mode practice and movement rituals

slides.title: The Aether Accord
slides.body: Principles, values, and commitments for the shared field.

cards.title: Softness First
cards.body: Lead with warmth, humour, and patience.

cards.title: Sense the Field
cards.body: Pause every orbit to attune to breath, energy, and tone.

cards.title: Keep Iterating
cards.body: Share logs, celebrate experiments, and adjust quickly.
